creator: kargl@troutmask.apl.washington.edu
text:
portmaster print/a2ps-letter
cd
troutmask:kargl[216] a2ps -Ppug .cshrc
[.cshrc (C Shell): 1 page on 1 sheet]
/usr/bin/lpr: cannot access 
a2ps: received signal 13: Broken pipe: 13

pug is a validate printer queue.

Note, 'a2ps .cshrc | lpr -Ppug' works as expected.

How-To-Repeat: 	
See above.
